diy-hub-v1.current_task_title: Stage 8: Enter-Manually on every search + Inventory list/card view toggle
diy-hub-v1.approval_phrase: NOFI approves Candidate A + B for Stage 7
stage_5_features: live_search.py: 5 live HTTP clients (Commons, Wikidata, Wikipedia, PlatformIO, GitHub)
/api/components/search: live lookup with parallel fetch + merge + confidence
/api/components/detail: re-fetch Wikidata entity + PlatformIO page for richer spec
DB schema: 7 new columns (wikidata_id, commons_filename, source_url, manufacturer, release_year, confidence, datasheet_url)
AddComponent.tsx: state machine (idle -> searching -> picking/reviewing -> saving)
Confidence badge (green/amber/red), ADD TO DATABASE button, source attribution
stage_6_features: live_search.py: Adafruit vendor scraper (search + product page + datasheet link)
live_search.py: Pololu disabled (robots.txt disallows /search) with operator-facing note
live_search.py: 1-second throttle between requests to same vendor
Polite-crawler policy: max 2 requests per vendor per query (1 search + 1 product)
NO price/stock display (verified by key scan)
NO DDG scraping (0 hits in code)
NO SparkFun (1 hit, in a comment block explaining why disabled)
stage_7_features: Inventory page: full rewrite with 24 cards, search bar, category filter, empty/loading/error states
Manual entry: 12-field form accessible from empty-state dialog
Backend: _row_to_dict now promotes source/voltage/interfaces/key_specs/tags/description to top level
New lib: lib/categories.ts (canonical category list + color map)
New lib: lib/sources.ts (source badge + confidence badge color helpers)
All 4 servers 200, no regression to Stage 5/6
stage_8_features: AddComponent.tsx: 'Enter manually instead' button added to Confirm dialog (data-testid=btn-enter-manually-from-confirm)
AddComponent.tsx: 'Enter manually instead' button added to Model Picker dialog (data-testid=btn-enter-manually-from-picker)
AddComponent.tsx: Empty-state dialog 'Enter manually' button kept (regression OK)
Inventory.tsx: view toggle UI (Cards | List button group) with data-testids inventory-view-toggle/cards/list
Inventory.tsx: new InventoryRow component (small 48x48 image, dense rows)
lib/storage.ts: NEW helper for localStorage preferences with try/catch + 'diy-hub-v1-' prefix
view state initialized from localStorage and persisted on change
